chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3851 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge HG of Case. 1. For orders on Office Objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.09.2025. Ms. Rehana Mirani, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Mehran Khan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh alongwith Nadeem Qasim, Admin Officer, Sindh Local Govt. Board, Karachi. ----- Learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh invites attention to the Statement dated 30.07.2025 submitted on behalf of the Petitioner, which reflects that only a sum of Rs.222,012.99 remains payable. He undertakes that the aforementioned amount would be settled within 30 days from today. Learned counsel for the Petitioner is also satisfied in that regard. By consent, the instant Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
